title: Why China's airlines suffer more from the Iran war than global rivals
summary: China's carriers face elevated jet fuel costs and limited hedging strategies, while their customer base can easily switch to cheaper rail alternatives. This makes them more vulnerable to regional disruptions than international competitors.
content: China's carriers face sky-high jet fuel, lack of hedging strategies, and a customer base that can easily pivot to cheaper high-speed rail services.

zh.title: 为什么中国航空公司受伊朗战争的影响比全球竞争对手更大
zh.summary: 中国航空公司面临较高的喷气燃料成本和有限的套期保值策略,而其客户群可以轻松转向更便宜的铁路运输。这使得它们比国际竞争对手更容易受到地区动荡的影响。

title: Oil resumes rally as Iran reportedly wants to keep enriched uranium within the country
summary: Oil prices are recovering amid geopolitical tensions over Iran's uranium stockpile. The IEA warns that summer travel demand could push oil markets into a critical zone soon.
content: The International Energy Agency warned that as travel demand grows during the summer season, oil markets could enter a "red zone" soon.

zh.title: 随着伊朗据称想要将浓缩铀保留在国内,油价恢复上升
zh.summary: 油价在伊朗铀浓缩库存的地缘政治紧张局势中恢复。国际能源署警告称,夏季旅游需求可能很快将石油市场推入关键区域。

title: Stocks tread water — but a wave of volatility is building
summary: The S&P 500 is displaying technical sell signals despite positive Nvidia earnings, suggesting market volatility may increase despite recent price stagnation.
content: S&P 500 analysis shows technical sell signals are flashing despite Nvidia earnings hype.

zh.title: 股票停滞不前 - 但波动浪潮正在酝酿
zh.summary: 尽管英伟达财报积极,但标普500指数显示技术性卖出信号,这表明尽管近期价格停滞,市场波动可能会增加。

title: Japan core inflation softens to over four year low, weakening case for BOJ rate hike
summary: Japan's core inflation fell below economist expectations to its lowest level in over four years, undermining arguments for the Bank of Japan to raise interest rates.
content: Core inflation — which strips out prices of fresh food — was lower than the 1.7% expected by economists polled by Reuters and below the 1.8% reading in March.

zh.title: 日本核心通胀率降至四年多来最低水平，削弱日本央行加息理由
zh.summary: 日本核心通胀率跌至经济学家预期以下，创四年多来新低，削弱了日本央行上调利率的论点。

title: Asia-Pacific markets open higher as investors assess U.S.-Iran peace deal diplomacy
summary: Asia-Pacific markets gained ground as investors monitor potential U.S.-Iran peace deal negotiations, though Iran's insistence on keeping its uranium enrichment complicates diplomatic progress.
content: While oil prices fell in U.S. trading, reports that Tehran intends to keep its enriched uranium stockpile within the country stand to complicate negotiations with the U.S.

zh.title: 投资者评估美伊和平协议外交之际亚太股市走高
zh.summary: 随着投资者关注潜在的美伊和平协议谈判，亚太股市上涨，但伊朗坚持保留铀浓缩计划使外交进展复杂化。

title: SpaceX has a lot riding on its imminent Starship rocket launch
summary: SpaceX's upcoming Starship launch, expected as soon as Friday, carries significant weight for the company's IPO narrative and investor expectations. The mission is framed as a critical milestone for the company's public offering.
content: The launch, which could happen as soon as Friday, comes ahead of “an IPO that’s basing so much” on narrative and symbolism.

zh.title: SpaceX即将到来的Starship火箭发射寄托了公司许多期待
zh.summary: SpaceX即将进行的Starship发射预计最早周五进行，对公司IPO叙述和投资者预期有重大影响。该任务被视为公司上市的关键里程碑。
